info.name: Temporal Cloud Operations API
info.description:
The Temporal Cloud Operations API provides HTTP endpoints for programmatically managing Temporal Cloud control plane resources including Namespaces, Users, Service Accounts, API keys, and other infrastructure components.

Contact Support:
 Name: Temporal Technologies
